title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 56.230 - Stenographic and clerical help (second class counties)
text:
56.230.  Stenographic and clerical help (second class counties). — The prosecuting attorney, in counties of the second class, may employ such stenographic and clerical help, with the approval of the county commission, as may be necessary to the efficient operation of his office.  The salary of any stenographer or clerk, so employed, shall be fixed by the prosecuting attorney, with the approval of the county commission.
(L. 1945 p. 572 § 6)
